steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The text says Lecuona's body of work showcases a diverse range of musical talents in different areas, from orchestral pieces and operas to popular film scores. The blank should describe this diversity.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
The blank describes Lecuona's body of work, which "showcased a diverse range of musical talents in different areas, from orchestral pieces and operas to popular film scores." The word must mean "diverse / many kinds." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — outdated: obsolete; nothing in the passage suggests his works are old-fashioned. ✗
  • Choice B — varied: showing variety; matches the colon definition exactly — different areas, different genres. ✓
  • Choice C — forgotten: not remembered; the passage celebrates his impressive output, not obscurity. ✗
  • Choice D — lonely: alone or solitary; doesn't describe a body of work. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
